description: '''Krushclub''' is a subgenre of sigilkore, originating in the early 2020s, mixing [[jersey club]] elements with electronic sound qualities, known for its energetic sound and catchy beats. The style was pioneered by [[Luci4]] with his song "Kurxxed Emeraldz". The term "krushclub" was coined by artist [[Lumi Athena]] to describe the fusion of jersey club music and [[Bitcrusher|bitcrushing effects]]. According to music journalist [[Kieran Press-Reynolds]], writing for ''[[The Face (magazine)|The Face]]'', "there's krush-jerk and krush-cumbia, krush-funk and krush-phonk."
